text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This year, Symboli Rudolf will finally be
competing at the senior level.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've come together to the shrine to pray for her
success.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It seems the instructors are already here.

text_block_list.name: Tracen Academy Instructor A
text_block_list.text:
Hello there, Rudolf! Here for a New Year's visit,
are you?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Indeed. Happy New Year to you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I mean to visit again later with the rest of the
student council, but I thought I might pay an
informal visit first. I hope you don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Tracen Academy Instructor B
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. I presume you'll be praying for success
in your races?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Although, considering my position, it
would only be proper to pray for the success of
the academy as well.

text_block_list.name: Tracen Academy Instructor C
text_block_list.text:
You're always in president mode, aren't you?
That's why the students all say they can rely on
you!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Rely... on me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A shadow falls over Rudolf's face for a moment,
but it leaves as quickly as it arrives.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: My parents did always say they needed to keep a... "real eye" on me to keep me out of mischief.

text_block_list.name: Tracen Academy Instructor A
text_block_list.text:
Well, if that ain't the "punniest" thing I've heard
all day! Gahaha!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
"Punniest"? D-dear me, that's a good one...
Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting the impression that the teachers share
Rudolf's sense of humor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eventually, the teachers leave...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hrm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...But Rudolf still seems to have something on her
mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I expect to hear the reason why her expression
clouded over a few minutes ago, but instead...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I fear I have embarrassed myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I concocted a falsehood for the sake of a joke...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I was never an especially mischievous child, let
alone infamous for such behavior.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That joke I told was a fabrication. And I should
know better than anyone that reflecting reality is
the essence of comedy...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The idea suddenly appeared in my mind, and I
acted rashly on the impulse. I regret my actions
entirely...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, let's. We have no time to be agonizing over
crimes against comedy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Our schedule is full to bursting. Even this shrine
visit is pressed for time.
choice_data_list: This year's off to a busy start, eh?
This year's off to a busy start, eh?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The start of a new year is always busy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We have associates to greet, New Year's
gatherings to attend, leftover work from the
previous year... Our duties are many and varied.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So, seeing as we have so little time, let's get to
the point.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They say that a wish cannot survive being put into
words, but they also say that a promise made is a
promise kept.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And I would prefer to speak our wishes aloud, so
that we might share them. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Then tell me your wish for this year.
choice_data_list: Good health. I want you to eat healthy.

Dominance. I want you to be the greatest
Emperor in history.
Culture. I want you to refine your comedy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A fine idea. Every Umamusume should strive for
the same.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And with my time at such a premium this year, it
will be all the more important to remain conscious
of what I consume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, I may know how to make the
perfect start.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I notice a certain drink is on offer at the stall over
there.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That's the one. What say we sample some?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Surely we can take a five-minute break in the
name of good health.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf and I clink our cups together as
we enjoy a brief reprieve.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Dominance? Well, now. That is quite the
audacious goal.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Are you asking me to rise to the same level as the
deities of myth?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The road will be long and arduous... but then, I
wouldn't have it any other way.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And besides, I do admire that you can make such
grand declarations without batting an eyelid.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Very well, let us walk the path of dominance
together. I trust this year will be our greatest yet.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oho? Could it be?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Have you finally opened your eyes to the
possibilities of puns?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you helped me refine my art, it would save me
from embarrassments like the one before.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We should hold a study session as soon as
possible. Could you come prepared with some
ideas?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Let's see... a hundred should be sufficient.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you would be so kind. Fear not; I too will bring
my best material.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, Symboli Rudolf and I hold a
pun-storming session, to which she really brings
her A-game.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The work we put in is no joke. I think it has paid
off, even if there's still a long way to go.
